message:
✨ Migrate Security dashboard to DashboardPage component (#481)

Reduces Security.tsx from 1237 lines to 939 lines (24% reduction) by
using the unified DashboardPage component with beforeCards prop.

Changes:
- Remove SortableSecurityCard, SecurityDragPreviewCard components
- Remove DnD imports and manual setup
- Remove useDashboard destructuring and modal handling
- Use beforeCards prop for tabs section
- Preserve all tab content (Overview, Issues, RBAC, Compliance)

Bundle size reduced from 34.19 kB to 29.50 kB (14% smaller).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
